source_authorization: Authorize P213E 3_STAR/4_STAR positional schema implementation design review (read-only, no DB write)
p213d_recommended_option: Option C — dual-write additive numbers_positional column; numbers remains sorted canonical; numbers_positional stores draw order for permutation games only; backward compatible; no breaking change

locations: _init_database() migration block (after existing ALTER TABLE patterns)
implementation_touchpoints.description: Add numbers_positional column to schema; add try/except migration; dual-write positional field for permutation games in insert path

files_not_to_modify: Any read path or strategy file
behavior_changes: CREATE TABLE draws gains numbers_positional TEXT DEFAULT NULL column
try/except ALTER TABLE migration adds column to existing installs safely
insert_draws() for permutation games: writes json.dumps(numbers) to numbers_positional (draw order)
insert_draws() for permutation games: still writes json.dumps(sorted(numbers)) to numbers field
insert_draws() for non-permutation games: numbers_positional = NULL
All read paths: unchanged (return sorted numbers)
proposed_p213f_scope.non_permutation_unchanged_guarantee: BIG_LOTTO, POWER_LOTTO, DAILY_539 are completely unaffected; numbers field semantics unchanged for all types
proposed_p213f_scope.permutation_order_preservation_guarantee: 3_STAR and 4_STAR new inserts will have draw order in numbers_positional
proposed_p213f_scope.no_production_db_write_in_p213f: All P213F tests use in-memory or temp SQLite; production DB not touched

numbers.semantics: Canonical sorted field; used by all existing consumers; unchanged for all game types

numbers_positional.value: JSON array in original draw order for permutation games; NULL otherwise
numbers_positional.semantics: Draw order field for 3_STAR and 4_STAR only; infrastructure; not yet consumed by any strategy
numbers_positional.strategy_use_prohibited: No strategy may use numbers_positional until separately authorized

test_plan.db_isolation: All tests use sqlite3 :memory: or a tempfile.mkstemp() path; production DB path must not appear in test code

p213f.migration: schema migration to test/staging DB only; _init_database() pattern in database.py
p213f.authorization_phrase: Authorize P213F 3_STAR/4_STAR positional code fix implementation and tests (no production DB write)

p213g.migration: source validation dry-run only; no DB write
p213g.authorization_phrase: Authorize P213G 3_STAR/4_STAR historical draw re-download and dry-run source parser validation (no DB write to production)

p213h.migration: production schema migration + re-ingestion of historical draws
pre_conditions: P213F tests pass on temp DB
P213G dry-run validates 開出順序 extraction from actual source files
drift guard passes before and after
p213h.authorization_phrase: Authorize P213H 3_STAR/4_STAR controlled production DB migration (DB write authorized, backup confirmed, dry-run passed)

risks.risk: Breaking existing sorted assumptions in numbers
risks.mitigation: numbers semantics unchanged; sorted always written
numbers is canonical; numbers_positional is infrastructure-only until authorized

risks.risk: Stale historical rows with NULL positional field
risks.mitigation: NULL means not yet available, not invalid; documented

risks.risk: Source order ambiguity vs mock format
Accidental production DB write in P213F
risks.mitigation: All P213F tests must use :memory: or temp path; production path forbidden
3_STAR/4_STAR remain UNDERPOWERED_NO_SIGNAL (P227C); numbers_positional must not be used for strategy
Use lottery_types.json config lookup; test all permutation/non-permutation cases
try/except pattern already used for 5+ columns in same file; safe and idempotent

exact_authorization_phrase_for_next_dire: Authorize P213F 3_STAR/4_STAR positional code fix implementation and tests (no production DB write)
recommended_next_direction_rationale: P213E confirms: only database.py needs modification; migration pattern established; csv_validator needs no changes; 17-test plan fully specified; non-permutation games provably unaffected
p238b_interpretation: RANDOMNESS_AUDIT_YELLOW_OBSERVATION_ONLY — observation only; not a strategy signal; not betting advice; not a production change; unchanged by this task
